item.title: Grand Launch of TISA Insurance (Fiji) Ltd | Creating opportunity through inclusion
item.description: EVERY community deserves the opportunity to thrive. That belief has inspired TISA Insurance to support programmes that restore dignity and open doors for vulnerable members of society. Through partnerships with organisations such as Corona Fiji and Being Helping Hands Fiji, TISA supports dignity pack programs that provide essential hygiene products to young women and schoolgirls in rural communiti
item.content:encoded:
EVERY community deserves the opportunity to thrive. That belief has inspired TISA Insurance to support programmes that restore dignity and open doors for vulnerable members of society.

Through partnerships with organisations such as Corona Fiji and Being Helping Hands Fiji, TISA supports dignity pack programs that provide essential hygiene products to young women and schoolgirls in rural communities.

The items themselves are simple; their impact is profound. They help women protect their wellbeing and reinforce the importance of dignity and inclusion.

The company has also continued its partnership with Homes of Hope and Loloma Homes, supporting women and young girls who have experienced abuse and hardship.

By providing workplace exposure and practical learning opportunities, TISA is helping participants build confidence, develop valuable skills and prepare for independent futures.

These initiatives reflect a simple but powerful philosophy: empowering one individual can transform an entire family and, ultimately, a community.

Education remains one of the most powerful tools for lasting change, and TISA Insurance continues to support initiatives that improve access to learning, particularly for students in underserved communities.

Its partnership with the Foundation for the Education of Needy Children (FENC) has helped provide laptops and essential classroom furniture, giving students greater access to educational resources and digital learning.

Support for Rokotuivatu District School has helped establish a new computer laboratory, ensuring students in remote communities have opportunities comparable to those in urban centres.

These investments are about far more than computers and equipment.

They are investments in knowledge, confidence and the aspirations of young Fijians who will shape the country’s future.

© 2026 FijiTimes. All rights reserved.

item.title: Grand Launch of TISA Insurance (Fiji) Ltd | Expanding financial protection through innovation
item.description: INNOVATION sits at the heart of how TISA Insurance serves its customers. The Bancassurance Initiative of the Year, Fiji award recognises the company’s work with a leading financial services partner to make insurance a seamless part of everyday financial decisions.
item.content:encoded:
INNOVATION sits at the heart of how TISA Insurance serves its customers.

The Bancassurance Initiative of the Year, Fiji award recognises the company’s work with a leading financial services partner to make insurance a seamless part of everyday financial decisions.

The initiative simplifies the customer experience, supports responsible lending and brings financial protection within reach of everyday Fijians.

Strengthening Healthcare Access in Papua New Guinea.

The Strategic Partnership Initiative of the Year – Papua New Guinea award recognises an initiative that has transformed the way policyholders access essential healthcare services.

The initiative improves access to care at the moment it is needed most – a clear example of how the right partnership can improve customer outcomes while strengthening financial protection for communities across Papua New Guinea.

Driving Sustainable Growth Across Papua New Guinea Recognition as Domestic General Insurer of the Year – Papua New Guinea reflects sustained performance in one of the Pacific’s most diverse markets.

TISA Insurance has continued to expand insurance access while maintaining disciplined underwriting and prudent risk management and is investing in its capabilities to make insurance simpler and more accessible for thousands of members across the country.

These results are made possible by a culture built on collaboration, accountability and a shared commitment to excellence.

While these awards recognise business performance, they also acknowledge the company’s responsibilities to the communities it serves.

Across the Pacific, TISA Insurance continues to invest in initiatives that strengthen financial inclusion, support grassroots sport, empower women, encourage small business development and contribute to healthier, more resilient communities – because its impact should extend beyond the policies it underwrites.

These four awards belong to everyone who has been part of the TISA Insurance journey: its employees, customers, brokers, agents, partners, community organisations and stakeholders across the Pacific.

Their trust, partnership and support continue to inspire the company to keep improving, innovating and delivering on its promise.

As TISA Insurance begins this new chapter, the company remains focused on building a stronger, more resilient Pacific by providing trusted insurance solutions that create lasting value for customers and communities across Fiji, Papua New Guinea, Tonga, Vanuatu and the Solomon Islands.

TISA Insurance looks to the future with confidence, purpose and an unwavering commitment to protecting what matters most.

These four awards belong to everyone who has been part of the TISA Insurance journey: its employees, customers, brokers, agents, partners, community organisations and stakeholders across the Pacific. Picture: TISA

© 2026 FijiTimes. All rights reserved.

item.title: Grand Launch of TISA Insurance (Fiji) Ltd | A new chapter recognised across the Pacific
item.description: As TISA Insurance begins an exciting new chapter across the Pacific, the Group is proud to announce it has been honoured with four awards at the Insurance Asia Awards 2026 recognition of its commitment to protecting communities, driving innovation and delivering sustainable growth. These awards reflect the trust customers place in TISA Insurance, the dedication of its people, and the strength of t
item.content:encoded:
As TISA Insurance begins an exciting new chapter across the Pacific, the Group is proud to announce it has been honoured with four awards at the Insurance Asia Awards 2026 recognition of its commitment to protecting communities, driving innovation and delivering sustainable growth.

These awards reflect the trust customers place in TISA Insurance, the dedication of its people, and the strength of the partnerships that continue to shape its success across the region.

Across Fiji and Papua New Guinea, TISA Insurance Group was recognised in four categories:

International General Insurer of the Year;

Fiji, Bancassurance Initiative of the Year;

Fiji, Domestic General Insurer of the Year;

Papua New Guinea, Strategic Partnership Initiative of the Year – Papua New Guinea.

Together, these achievements reinforce TISA Insurance’s vision of building one of the Pacific’s leading insurance groups – one that strengthens financial resilience and expands access to protection for individuals, families, businesses and communities.

The International General Insurer of the Year – Fiji award reflects the company’s focus on disciplined growth, strong governance and long-term value for its customers.

TISA Insurance has continued to strengthen and diversify its business, broadening the range of solutions it offers and the ways customers can access them – ensuring more Fijians have access to quality insurance when and where they need it.

That progress rests on responsible underwriting, prudent pricing and effective claims management.

Above all, it rests on the company’s people, whose professionalism, technical expertise and customer-first approach turn strategy into meaningful outcomes every day.

Insurance Asia awards 2026 with participants across Asia Pacific. Picture: TISA

© 2026 FijiTimes. All rights reserved.

item.title: Grand Launch of TISA Insurance (Fiji) Ltd | Building a stronger Fiji together
item.description: STRONG communities are built on compassion. TISA Insurance has continued to support initiatives that improve the wellbeing of vulnerable members of society, including providing wheelchairs to elderly residents of Naimalavau Village to enhance mobility, independence and quality of life.
item.content:encoded:
STRONG communities are built on compassion.

TISA Insurance has continued to support initiatives that improve the wellbeing of vulnerable members of society, including providing wheelchairs to elderly residents of Naimalavau Village to enhance mobility, independence and quality of life.

The company’s commitment to community wellbeing extends to healthcare.

Through its sponsorship of the Fiji Pharmaceutical Society Annual Conference, TISA supports the professional development of pharmacists and recognises their essential contribution to improving health outcomes throughout Fiji, reinforcing its belief that resilient communities begin with healthy people.

Empowering people through leadership and enterprise

Economic resilience begins with opportunity, and TISA Insurance actively supports initiatives that empower entrepreneurs, develop leaders and strengthen local businesses.

Its sponsorship of the WIN Convention, by the Women Entrepreneurs Business Council, reflects a commitment to advancing women in business, creating opportunities for networking, learning and entrepreneurship.

The company’s partnership with Leadership Fiji further demonstrates its investment in developing principled, capable leaders across business, government and community sectors.

At the grassroots level, support for initiatives such as the Serea Upcycling Workshop, run by Tiko Ledua, equips women and young people with practical skills, encourages sustainability and creates new income-generating opportunities.

TISA has also proudly supported the Business Assistance Fiji (BAF) Conference, helping micro, small and medium enterprises grow through innovation and networking.

Together, these initiatives reflect a long-term commitment to inclusive economic development and financial empowerment.

Few industries contribute more to Fiji’s economy and rural livelihoods than agriculture.

As Platinum Sponsor of the Prime Minister’s Sugarcane Farmers Awards, TISA Insurance proudly recognises the dedication of the thousands of farmers whose hard work sustains families, communities and the national economy.

Supporting Fiji’s cane growers reflects the company’s broader commitment to rural development an acknowledgement that resilient farming communities are essential to a resilient nation.

© 2026 FijiTimes. All rights reserved.

item.title: Grand Launch of TISA Insurance (Fiji) Ltd | Protecting Pacific communities
item.description: For almost four decades, the organisation has stood beside individuals, families, businesses and communities through times of uncertainty and recovery. From natural disasters and severe weather events to personal and commercial losses, the company has remained focused on providing peace of mind and financial security.
item.content:encoded:
For almost four decades, the organisation has stood beside individuals, families, businesses and communities through times of uncertainty and recovery.

From natural disasters and severe weather events to personal and commercial losses, the company has remained focused on providing peace of mind and financial security.

David Ariff Chan, Chief Executive Officer of TISA Insurance (Fiji) Limited, said the new brand builds on a strong foundation of trust and service.

“While our name has changed, our purpose remains the same. We are here to protect what matters most to our customers, partners. and communities.

This launch celebrates the relationships we have built over many years and our commitment to serving the Pacific for generations to come.”

The evening showcased the rich culture and talent of Fiji through traditional ceremonies, cultural performances and local entertainment, creating an atmosphere that celebrated both heritage and progress.

Adding to the excitement of the evening, TISA brand ambassadors and Fijian rugby legends Waisale Serevi and Nemani Nadolo took centre stage for a special segment, engaging warmly with guests and sharing a memorable exchange with the Prime Minister.

The pair also presented signed rugby balls to delighted members of the audience – a fitting tribute to the sport that unites Fiji and a reflection of TISA’s deep connection to the community it serves.

The event also recognised the contributions of staff, business partners, brokers, agents and clients who have supported the company’s growth and success over the years.

Upper right: Dreketi Rugby Club entertain guests.

Where culture meets community… the evening opened with captivating traditional performances by the Dreketi Rugby Club and choir reflecting the rich cultural heritage and warm hospitality that lie at the heart of Fiji.

Right: The evening showcased the rich culture and talent of Fiji through traditional ceremonies, cultural performances and local entertainment, creating an atmosphere that celebrated both heritage and progress.

© 2026 FijiTimes. All rights reserved.

item.title: Grand Launch of TISA Insurance (Fiji) Ltd | Celebrating a new chapter
item.description: Traditional cultural performances welcomed guests and celebrated Fiji’s rich heritage Picture: TISA The evening concluded with entertainment celebrating the people and partnerships.
item.content:encoded:
Traditional cultural performances welcomed guests and celebrated Fiji’s rich heritage Picture: TISA

The evening concluded with entertainment celebrating the people and partnerships.

© 2026 FijiTimes. All rights reserved.

item.title: Grand Launch of TISA Insurance (Fiji) Ltd | Investing in youth through Sport
item.description: SPORT has a unique ability to unite communities while shaping the character of young people. For TISA Insurance, supporting grassroots sport is about far more than competition it is about building discipline, leadership, teamwork and hope.
item.content:encoded:
SPORT has a unique ability to unite communities while shaping the character of young people.

For TISA Insurance, supporting grassroots sport is about far more than competition it is about building discipline, leadership, teamwork and hope.

Across Fiji, the company proudly supports a growing number of grassroots sporting organisations, including Kadavu Rugby Union, Nadi Rugby Union, Navosa Rugby Union, Serua Rugby Union, Dreketi Rugby Club, Namuka-I-Lau, Dominion Brothers, Covenant Brothers.

Nukunitabua Rugby Club, Vuniqele Rugby Club, Newtown Rugby Club, Sabeto Rugby Club, Lomavata Rugby Club, Suva Grammar, RKS, Suva Rugby Referees Association, Namaka Football Club, Makoi Football Club, Raiwai Youth Club.

TISA Insurance has also participated in the Fiji Bitter Marist Sevens Tournament and sponsored the inaugural TISA Fijian 7s Legends match, featuring legendary Fijian rugby players from various eras.

TISA Insurance also sponsored the TISA Warriors team at the Marist Sevens tournament, recognising the important role experienced athletes play in mentoring future generations.

These partnerships create opportunities for young athletes, strengthen local clubs and encourage healthier, more connected communities throughout Fiji.

For TISA Insurance, investing in grassroots sport is an investment in future leaders.

More Than an Insurer Across every partnership, one message remains consistent.

Whether supporting a school in a remote community, empowering women through entrepreneurship, recognising Fiji’s farmers, improving healthcare, caring for the elderly or helping young athletes realise their potential, TISA Insurance believes success should be measured by the positive impact created in people’s lives.

Community investment is not a corporate responsibility programme undertaken on occasion.

It is part of who TISA Insurance is.As the company continues to grow across the Pacific, its commitment remains firmly anchored in the communities it serves.

By investing in people, strengthening partnerships and creating opportunities for future generations, TISA Insurance is helping build a Fiji that is more resilient, more inclusive and better prepared for tomorrow.

Sponsorship and support for grassroot level communities. Picture: TISA

© 2026 FijiTimes. All rights reserved.

item.title: Grand Launch of TISA Insurance (Fiji) Ltd | TISA Insurance launches new Pacific identity
item.description: TISA Insurance (Fiji) Ltd officially launched its new brand identity on May 27, 2026 – a significant milestone in the company’s journey and a reaffirmation of its commitment to protecting families, businesses and communities across Fiji and the Pacific. Held at the Grand Pacific Hotel in Suva, the launch brought together government leaders, industry stakeholders, business partners, brokers, agents
item.content:encoded:
TISA Insurance (Fiji) Ltd officially launched its new brand identity on May 27, 2026 – a significant milestone in the company’s journey and a reaffirmation of its commitment to protecting families, businesses and communities across Fiji and the Pacific.

Held at the Grand Pacific Hotel in Suva, the launch brought together government leaders, industry stakeholders, business partners, brokers, agents, clients and staff to celebrate the transformation from Capital Insurance Limited to TISA Insurance.

The occasion honoured the company’s proud history while looking ahead to its future as part of a unified Pacific insurance group.

The Prime Minister Sitiveni Rabuka, attended as chief guest and acknowledged the important role that strong financial institutions play in supporting economic resilience and community development throughout Fiji and the wider Pacific region.

The rebrand to TISA Insurance represents far more than a change of name.

It marks the company’s evolution into a stronger regional organisation aligned with the wider TISA Group, uniting insurance operations across multiple Pacific markets under a single identity.

Chairman of TISA Insurance Group, Michael Koisen OBE ML, reflected on the significance of the occasion and the organisation’s continued growth across the region.

“This launch represents our confidence in the future of the Pacific it reflects our commitment to building stronger communities, supporting economic development, and ensuring that our customers continue to have access to trusted insurance solutions when they need them most.” TISA Insurance Group chief executive officer Jeremy Norton, highlighted the importance of innovation and customer-focused growth.

“Our vision is to be the Pacific’s insurer, delivering solutions that meet the changing needs of our customers while remaining true to our values of trust, service, and community.

The launch of TISA Insurance is an important step in that journey.”

Left: Brand Ambassador TISA Insurance Nemani Nadolo, Prime Minister of Fiji, Sitiveni Rabuka, Brand Ambassador Waisale Serevi and David Ariff Chan CEO TISA Insurance Fiji Ltd.

© 2026 FijiTimes. All rights reserved.

item.title: Grand Launch of TISA Insurance (Fiji) Ltd | A new chapter with official rebrand begins
